back_translation: Of Solomon. O God, give Your justice to the king, and Your righteousness to the king's son.
May he judge Your people with righteousness, and Your afflicted with justice.
May the mountains bring peace to the people, and the hills bring righteousness.
May he give justice to the afflicted among the people; may he save the children of the needy and crush the oppressor.
May they fear him as long as the sun shines and as long as the moon endures, through all generations.
May he be like rain falling on freshly cut grass, like showers that water the earth.
May the righteous flourish in his reign, and may prosperity abound until the moon is no more.
May he rule from sea to sea, and from the Euphrates River to the ends of the earth.
May the desert nomads bow before him, and may his enemies lick the dust.
May the kings of Tarshish and the distant islands bring tribute; may the kings of Sheba and Seba bring gifts.
May all kings bow down to him, and may all nations serve him.
For he will deliver the needy who cry out, and the afflicted who have no one to help.
He will have pity on the poor and the needy, and will save the lives of the oppressed.
He will redeem them from oppression and violence, for their blood is precious in his sight.
May he live long; may gold from Sheba be brought to him; may people always pray for him and bless him all day long.

May there be abundant grain in the land; may the crops sway on the mountaintops; may its fruit flourish like the forests of Lebanon, and may the people of the cities thrive like the grass of the field.
May his name endure forever; may his name continue as long as the sun shines; may all nations be blessed in him and call him blessed.
Blessed be the LORD God, the God of Israel, who alone does marvelous deeds.
May His glorious name be praised forever; may all the earth be filled with His glory. Amen and amen.
The prayers of David, son of Jesse, end here.
